1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category columns (distinct values) within the municipality extent or nationally if necessary

3.description: retrieve AR50 polygons for the agricultural class (filtered by chosen category) for Stavanger

4.description: get teig parcels for Stavanger municipality (filtered by kommunenummer)

5.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

6.description: deduplicate parcels, sort by teigid ascending, and limit to 10

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category columns to identify agricultural land values

3.description: select AR50 polygons with agricultural land category (filtered by value discovered in step 2)

4.description: reduce AR50 agricultural polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with municipality geometry (step 1)

6.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons (reduced layer from step 4)

7.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teigid

9.description: return top 10 parcels by teigid ascending
